---
title: "quarto-liveurl — Sticky & Global URL"
format:
  revealjs:
    liveurl:
      button: true
      shortcut: "u"
      position: "right"
      width: "44vw"
      mode: "auto"
      openNewTabFallback: true
      sticky: true
      global:
        - label: "Quarto Guide"
          url: "https://quarto.org/docs/guide/"
revealjs-plugins:
  - liveurl
---

## Sticky + Global URL mode

This presentation has two special settings:

- **`sticky: true`** — the panel content is preserved across slide transitions
- **`liveurl.global`** — a URL available on every slide

**Try it:** Press **`u`** to open the panel, scroll down in the page,
then navigate to the next slide. The page stays exactly where you left it.

## Slide 2 — panel still showing your page

The Quarto Guide is still loaded in the panel at the same scroll position.

Navigate freely — the page won't reload until you **close and reopen** the panel.

::: {.liveurl}
- [Presentations Overview](https://quarto.org/docs/presentations/)
:::

This slide also has its own URL. The panel won't switch to it automatically
while `sticky: true`. Close and reopen the panel to load the new URL list.

## Slide 3 — no slide-specific URLs

No `data-liveurl` or `.liveurl` block here.

The **global URL is still accessible** — the link button stays fully active on
every slide because `liveurl.global` is set.

With `sticky: true`, the panel continues showing whatever was already loaded.

## Slide 4 — when to use sticky

Good use cases for `sticky: true`:

- **LLM chat sessions** — keep context as you walk through slides
- **Live dashboards** — don't interrupt auto-refresh or streaming data
- **Interactive apps** — preserve user state (form inputs, selections)
- **Reference docs** — let the audience read at their own pace while you advance

## Slide 5 — resetting the panel

::: {.liveurl}
- [Quarto Extensions](https://quarto.org/docs/extensions/)
- [Quarto Gallery](https://quarto.org/docs/gallery/)
:::

**Try the reset flow here:**

1. Press **`u`** to close the panel
2. Go back to slide 1 and press **`u`** to open (loads the Quarto Guide)
3. Navigate back to this slide, close the panel with **`u`**
4. Press **`u`** again — the panel now shows **this slide's URLs** above

The panel always re-renders from the current slide on a fresh open.
